---
title: "CMSACamp 2026"
---

Welcome to the Carnegie Mellon Sports Analytics Camp (CMSACamp), hosted by Department of Statistics & Data Science at Carnegie Mellon University. This program focuses on statistics and data science methodology with applications in sports analytics.

On this site, the [Lectures](lectures.qmd) tab contains all lecture slides, the [Labs](labs.qmd) tab contains materials for the labs, and the [Projects](labs.qmd) tab contains materials for the EDA and capstone projects.

# Pittsburgh Guides

* [Pittsburgh-based Resources](pittsburgh-resources.qmd)

* [Fun activities to do in Pittsburgh](pittsburgh-activities.qmd)
